title: Wire skill+hook install through fabric init bootstrap stage and fabric hooks command
description: Replace the bootstrap-stage no-op at init.ts:767-775 with skill-install logic that copies packages/cli/templates/skills/fabric-archive/SKILL.md into .claude/skills/fabric-archive/SKILL.md AND .codex/skills/fabric-archive/SKILL.md (conditional on detectClientSupports detected:true per client). Also add one-line pointer to CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / .cursor/rules. Replace the throwing v2 stub at hooks.ts:63-72 with full per-client hook install: (1) copy archive-hint.cjs into .claude/hooks/ and .codex/hooks/, (2) merge claude-code.json template into .claude/settings.json hooks.Stop[] using NEW deepMerge special-case (array-append-with-dedupe-by-command), (3) write/merge .codex/hooks.json from codex-hooks.json template. Update json.ts:18-39 deepMerge with optional path-based array-append handler. Update resolver.ts installedCapabilities probes to dynamically detect skill+hook installation state.

files.change: New module exporting two writer classes following the ClientConfigWriter pattern (clientKind, detect(), write()). ClaudeStopHookWriter.write({target,hookScriptSrc,configFragmentPath}): copy archive-hint.cjs to <target>/.claude/hooks/archive-hint.cjs (atomicWriteText), read existing .claude/settings.json (or {}), deepMerge with array-append-dedupe applied to path 'hooks.Stop[]', atomicWriteJson back. CodexHookWriter.write({target,hookScriptSrc,configFragmentPath}): copy archive-hint.cjs to <target>/.codex/hooks/archive-hint.cjs, read .codex/hooks.json (or {}), deepMerge with array-append-dedupe on the Codex Stop array path, atomicWriteJson back. Both writers chmod +x the .cjs file post-copy on POSIX (skip on win32). Both return {hookScriptPath, configPath} for InstallHooksResult.

files.target: deepMerge L18-39 add optional arrayAppendPaths option
files.change: Extend deepMerge signature to accept optional third arg `options?: {arrayAppendPaths?: Map<string, (item)=>string>}` mapping dotted-path (e.g. 'hooks.Stop[].hooks') to dedupe-key extractor. When recursion enters a path matching arrayAppendPaths AND both source+target are arrays, perform append-with-dedupe-by-key (instead of default REPLACE). For Stop hook merge, dedupe key extractor returns hooks[0].command. Backward-compatible: omitting options preserves current REPLACE semantics.

Replace `throw new Error('fab hooks install is not available in v2 ...')` with real per-client install: (1) const supports = await detectClientSupports(target); (2) const results = []; (3) if supports.claudeCode.detected: results.push(await ClaudeStopHookWriter.write({...})); (4) if supports.codex.detected: results.push(await CodexHookWriter.write({...})); (5) return InstallHooksResult{installed: results.flatMap(r=>[r.hookScriptPath, r.configPath]), skipped: <unsupported clients>}. Update InstallHooksResult type at L19-26 to broaden hookPath/packageJsonPath into installed:string[] + skipped:string[] (existing init.ts:801 uses .installed.length — keep that field shape).

files.target: L767-775 fill bootstrap stage with skill install + L800-803 confirm hooks stage delegation
files.change: Bootstrap stage: const supports = await detectClientSupports(target); for each detected client (claude/codex): copy packages/cli/templates/skills/fabric-archive/SKILL.md → <target>/.claude/skills/fabric-archive/SKILL.md and/or <target>/.codex/skills/fabric-archive/SKILL.md (atomicWriteText). Idempotent: skip copy if destination identical-content (sha256 compare). Then append one-line pointer to CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / .cursor/rules: `> See .claude/skills/fabric-archive/SKILL.md for knowledge-archive workflow.` (idempotent — skip if line already present via grep). Hooks stage: existing call `await installHooks(plan.target, {force})` requires no change — installHooks now does the real work.

Replace static defaults with dynamic existsSync probes: ClaudeCodeCLI.installedCapabilities.skill = existsSync(join(workspaceRoot,'.claude','skills','fabric-archive','SKILL.md')); .hook = existsSync(join(workspaceRoot,'.claude','settings.json')) AND content has hooks.Stop entry pointing to archive-hint.cjs (cheap parse). CodexCLI.installedCapabilities.skill = existsSync(join(workspaceRoot,'.codex','skills','fabric-archive','SKILL.md')); .hook = existsSync(join(workspaceRoot,'.codex','hooks.json')) AND content has Stop entry. Cursor stays hook:false / skill:false unchanged.

implementation: Read packages/cli/src/commands/init.ts:767-812 (bootstrap and hooks stage branches) to understand current dispatch pattern
Read packages/cli/src/commands/hooks.ts L1-90 to understand InstallHooksResult shape and existing detectClientSupports usage
Read packages/cli/src/config/json.ts L18-122 (deepMerge + writeJsonClientConfig) to understand merge primitives
Read packages/cli/src/config/resolver.ts L90-165 to understand client capability detection
Author packages/cli/src/config/hooks-writer.ts with ClaudeStopHookWriter + CodexHookWriter classes following existing ClaudeCodeCLIWriter shape
Modify json.ts deepMerge to accept options.arrayAppendPaths Map<string, dedupe-key-fn>; add path-tracking via recursion accumulator; preserve backward compat (no options → current behavior)
Replace hooks.ts:63-72 throwing stub with detectClientSupports-driven loop calling each writer; update InstallHooksResult type to {installed:string[], skipped:string[]}
Fill init.ts:767-775 bootstrap stage with skill copy + pointer-line append (idempotent via sha256/grep guards)
Update resolver.ts installedCapabilities probes to dynamic existsSync checks
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli typecheck && pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli build` to validate compile
Commit: `feat(cli): wire skill+hook install through fabric init and fabric hooks`

reference.pattern: Per-client config writer pattern + init pipeline stage delegation
reference.examples: Mirror existing config/json.ts:81-122 writeJsonClientConfig pattern (read existing → deepMerge → atomicWriteJson) for hook config writers. Mirror config/resolver.ts:113-116 capability detection pattern. Stop-hook merge requires NEW special-case in deepMerge — no existing precedent, but path-keyed array-append is a 20-line addition.

criteria: init.ts bootstrap stage (L767-775) no longer empty — runs skill install logic
hooks.ts:63-72 no longer throws — installHooks returns InstallHooksResult{installed:string[], skipped:string[]}
json.ts deepMerge accepts arrayAppendPaths option without breaking existing call sites (verified by `pnpm test` green)

Running `fabric init` on a Claude Code project creates: .claude/skills/fabric-archive/SKILL.md, .claude/hooks/archive-hint.cjs (chmod +x on POSIX), .claude/settings.json with hooks.Stop[] entry merged in
Running `fabric init` on a Codex project creates: .codex/skills/fabric-archive/SKILL.md, .codex/hooks/archive-hint.cjs, .codex/hooks.json with Stop entry
Cursor project: NO Stop-hook config written (Cursor hook:false honored); skill IS installed if Cursor detected (skills are inert without client but harmless)
Stop-hook merge is dedupe-safe: re-running fabric init does NOT duplicate hooks.Stop[] entry (verified by TASK-006 idempotent re-init test)
CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / .cursor/rules each gain one-line pointer to fabric-archive skill (idempotent — skip if already present)
resolver.ts installedCapabilities reflects actual filesystem state (skill+hook present → true; absent → false)
Per-file coverage ≥90% on hooks-writer.ts, modified hooks.ts, modified init.ts changes (verified by TASK-008)

rationale.chosen_approach: Repurpose bootstrap stage for skills (no new InitStageName); extend hooks stage via real installHooks() impl; new hooks-writer.ts module for per-client logic; minimal deepMerge extension for array-append-dedupe
alternatives_considered: Add new 'skills' stage to InitStageName enum — rejected: requires updating wizard + capability table for marginal semantic gain (integration exploration clarification 3 option 0)
Hardcode hooks.Stop merge directly in hooks.ts — rejected: deepMerge extension is reusable for future client config patches
Skip resolver.ts probe updates — rejected: stale installedCapabilities defaults would mislead doctor command output
decision_factors: Minimum InitStageName churn (rc.2 prefers reuse over rename per memory:feedback_clean_slate)
Per-client writer pattern is established (ClaudeCodeCLIWriter / CursorWriter / etc. — extend, don't invent)
Idempotent re-init is non-negotiable (existing init-guard.test.ts contract)
rationale.tradeoffs: Extending deepMerge with options breaks pure-function simplicity slightly — accepted for backward compat (existing call sites unchanged)

manual_checks: Run `pnpm fabric init` on a fresh werewolf-stub fixture; ls -la .claude/skills/ .claude/hooks/ .codex/skills/ .codex/hooks/ — confirm all 4 files present
Cat .claude/settings.json → confirm hooks.Stop[] contains archive-hint entry without clobbering other content
Re-run fabric init → confirm settings.json hooks.Stop[] still has exactly one archive-hint entry (no dup)
Cat AGENTS.md → confirm pointer line present once
Verify chmod +x on .claude/hooks/archive-hint.cjs via stat -f%p (POSIX) or ls -l
success_metrics: Coverage ≥90% on hooks-writer.ts and modified portions of hooks.ts/init.ts
Re-init on a project with pre-existing custom hooks.Stop[] entry preserves user entries (no clobber)
